title: Torrezx-Trims tools
description: Decorate your items like your armor, with the new trims tools
body:
Torrezx-Trims Tools!

ESPAÑOL

Añade los trims pero en herramientas de netherite,disfruta de los 5 nuevos diseños para tus
herramientas.
Diseños: Oro-Diamante-Hierro-Redstone-Esmeralda

requiere optifine

ENGLISH

Add the trims but in netherite tools, enjoy the 5 new designs for your tools.
tools.
Designs: Gold-Diamond-Amathys-Iron-Redstone-Esmeralda

rename the tools by this to get their new version:
(in axe-sword-pickaxe)

-diamond
-gold
-redstone
-amathys
-emerald
-copper
-iron
-quarz

example: redstone sword
